add-multi-line-text-watermark-pdf.title: Add Multi-Line Text Watermark to PDF
add-multi-line-text-watermark-pdf.description: Shows how to create a multi-line text watermark and add it as a header on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp facade.

rotate-text-stamp-45-degrees.title: Rotate Text Stamp 45 Degrees in PDF
rotate-text-stamp-45-degrees.description: Demonstrates creating a TextStamp, setting its rotation to 45 degrees around its center, and applying it to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-pdf-page-stamp-as-background.title: Apply PDF Page Stamp as Background to All Pages
apply-pdf-page-stamp-as-background.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to bind a source PDF, create a background stamp from another PDF's first page, and apply it to every page of the document.

apply-pdf-template-stamp-to-page.title: Apply PDF Template Stamp to Specific Page
apply-pdf-template-stamp-to-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp and Stamp to bind a page from an external template PDF and place it as a stamp on the third page of another PDF.

add-lowercase-roman-page-numbers-to-odd-.title: Add Lowercase Roman Page Numbers to Odd Pages
add-lowercase-roman-page-numbers-to-odd-.description: Demonstrates how to add page numbers in lowercase Roman numerals to only the odd pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp.

combine-image-text-pdf-stamp.title: Combine Image and Text in a PDF Stamp
combine-image-text-pdf-stamp.description: Demonstrates creating a stamp that contains both a logo image and formatted text, then applying the combined stamp to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-header-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Header Stamp to All PDF Pages
add-header-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates iterating through a PDF document and adding a header stamp with a company name to each page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-footer-date-stamp-to-last-page.title: Add Footer Date Stamp to Last PDF Page
add-footer-date-stamp-to-last-page.description: Shows how to add a footer stamp with the current date (MM-dd-yyyy) to only the last page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-rotating-text-stamps.title: Apply Rotating Text Stamps to PDF Pages
apply-rotating-text-stamps.description: Shows how to add a text stamp to each page of a PDF and rotate it differently per page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp.

add-background-image-watermark-to-specif.title: Add Background Image Watermark to Specific PDF Pages
add-background-image-watermark-to-specif.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image watermark as a background stamp to pages 2‑5 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-add-multi-line-watermark-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Multi-Line Watermark to PDFs
batch-add-multi-line-watermark-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and apply the same multi-line text watermark to every page of each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

apply-pdf-stamp-preserve-filenames.title: Apply PDF Stamp and Preserve Original Filenames
apply-pdf-stamp-preserve-filenames.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑apply a PDF stamp to each document in a folder using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save the stamped PDFs to a separate directory while keeping the original file names.

overlay-disclaimer-pdf-first-page.title: Overlay Disclaimer PDF on First Page Using PdfFileStamp
overlay-disclaimer-pdf-first-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp and Stamp to overlay a legal disclaimer PDF onto the first page of a target PDF document.

apply-translucent-watermark-to-pdf.title: Apply Translucent Watermark to All PDF Pages
apply-translucent-watermark-to-pdf.description: Shows how to use PdfFileStamp and Stamp with 50% opacity to add a translucent text watermark to every page of a PDF document.

apply-rotated-image-stamp-bottom-right.title: Apply Rotated Image Stamp to Bottom Right of PDF Pages
apply-rotated-image-stamp-bottom-right.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp rotated 30° to the bottom‑right corner of every page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Page Numbers to PDF using PdfFileStamp
add-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates stamping a PDF with dynamic page numbers using the PdfFileStamp facade and the '#' placeholder.

add-multi-line-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Multi‑Line Watermark to PDF from Memory Stream
add-multi-line-watermark-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF in memory and apply a multi‑line, colored, custom‑size watermark using PdfFileStamp and related facade classes.

add-footer-stamp-10-points-above-bottom.title: Add Footer Stamp 10 Points Above Bottom Edge
add-footer-stamp-10-points-above-bottom.description: Demonstrates how to place a footer stamp exactly 10 points above the page bottom using Aspose.Pdf.Facades. The example creates formatted text, binds a PDF, adds the footer, and saves the result.

apply-text-stamp-to-even-pages.title: Apply Text Stamp to Even Pages of a PDF
apply-text-stamp-to-even-pages.description: Shows how to add a formatted text stamp only to even‑numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-qr-code-verification-stamp.title: Add QR Code and Description Stamp to PDF
add-qr-code-verification-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create an image stamp for a QR code and a text stamp with verification instructions, place them on each page, and save the stamped document.

apply-text-stamp-to-specific-pdf-pages.title: Apply Text Stamp to Specific PDF Pages
apply-text-stamp-to-specific-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to add a semi‑transparent text stamp only on pages 1, 5, and 10 of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-text-stamp-overlay-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Text Stamp Overlay to PDF Pages
add-text-stamp-overlay-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use the PdfFileStamp facade to place a formatted text stamp on top of existing PDF content by setting IsBackground to false.

add-barcode-header-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Barcode Header to PDF Pages
add-barcode-header-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp to place a pre‑generated barcode image as a header on every page of a PDF document.

add-transparent-text-stamp-to-selected-p.title: Add Transparent Text Stamp to Selected PDF Pages
add-transparent-text-stamp-to-selected-p.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent red text stamp labeled 'CONFIDENTIAL' to specific pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

custom-font-stamp-branding.title: Create a Custom Font Stamp for PDF Branding
custom-font-stamp-branding.description: Demonstrates how to load a TrueType font and use it to create a branded stamp that is applied to a PDF page with custom positioning, opacity, and background settings.

add-page-number-stamp-with-leading-zeros.title: Add Page Number Stamp with Leading Zeros to PDF
add-page-number-stamp-with-leading-zeros.description: Shows how to add a page‑number stamp formatted with leading zeros to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-apply-rotated-pdf-stamp.title: Batch Apply Rotated PDF Stamp to Multiple PDFs
batch-apply-rotated-pdf-stamp.description: Shows how to enumerate PDF files on a network share and apply a rotated background stamp from another PDF to each page, saving the stamped files to an output folder.

add-right-aligned-image-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Right-Aligned Image Stamp to PDF
add-right-aligned-image-stamp-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp, set its HorizontalAlignment to Right, and apply the stamp to each page.

add-semi-transparent-png-background-stam.title: Add Semi-Transparent PNG Background Stamp to PDF
add-semi-transparent-png-background-stam.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent PNG image as a background stamp that covers the entire page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

apply-multi-line-text-stamp-1-5-line-spa.title: Apply Multi-Line Text Stamp with 1.5 Line Spacing
apply-multi-line-text-stamp-1-5-line-spa.description: Demonstrates creating a multi-line text watermark with 1.5 line spacing using FormattedText, binding it to a Stamp, and applying the stamp to all pages of a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

add-creation-date-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Creation Date Stamp to PDF Pages
add-creation-date-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a text stamp that displays the document's creation date (formatted as yyyy-MM-dd) to the top‑left corner of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

merge-cover-page-background-pdf.title: Merge Cover Page as Background Using PdfFileStamp
merge-cover-page-background-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp and Stamp to apply the first page of a cover PDF as a background on every page of another PDF, producing a merged document.

add-image-and-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Image and Text Stamp to PDF
add-image-and-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to place a company logo image and a bold "Confidential" text stamp on a PDF document.

add-multi-line-watermark-pdf.title: Add Multi-Line Watermark with Line Spacing to PDF
add-multi-line-watermark-pdf.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to apply a multi‑line text watermark with opacity and background settings, positioning it via PdfFileStamp and FormattedText. Highlights that precise line height control requires separate stamps per line.

rotate-text-stamp-90-degrees.title: Rotate Text Stamp 90 Degrees and Verify Readability
rotate-text-stamp-90-degrees.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a text stamp by 90 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then verifies that the stamped text remains readable by extracting it from the resulting PDF.

add-footer-page-count-stamp.title: Add Footer Page Count Stamp to PDF
add-footer-page-count-stamp.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp to add a footer that automatically displays the total page count on each page of a PDF document.

create-multi-page-pdf-stamp.title: Create Multi‑Page PDF Stamp from Multiple PDFs
create-multi-page-pdf-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to combine several PDF files as stamps and apply them to each page of a target PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

apply-custom-colored-stamp-with-border.title: Apply Custom Colored Stamp with Border to PDF Pages
apply-custom-colored-stamp-with-border.description: Demonstrates how to add a rubber‑stamp annotation with custom text, color, and border thickness to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-rotated-image-stamp.title: Batch Add Rotated Image Stamp to First Page of PDFs
batch-add-rotated-image-stamp.description: Shows how to process all PDF files in a directory and apply a 45‑degree rotated image stamp to the first page of each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

apply-text-watermark-all-pdf-pages.title: Apply Text Watermark to All PDF Pages Using Facades
apply-text-watermark-all-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to create a semi‑transparent text stamp and apply it to every page of a PDF document in a single operation using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades API.

add-file-name-header-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add File Name Header Stamp to PDF
add-file-name-header-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp facade to add a header containing the source PDF's file name to each page of a PDF document.

add-semi-transparent-background-stamp.title: Add Semi-Transparent Background Stamp to PDF
add-semi-transparent-background-stamp.description: Demonstrates creating a formatted text stamp, setting it as a background with 30% opacity, and applying it to all pages of a PDF using the PdfFileStamp facade.

add-multi-line-watermark-varying-font-si.title: Add Multi-Line Watermark with Varying Font Sizes
add-multi-line-watermark-varying-font-si.description: Creates a PDF and uses PdfFileMend to add three watermark lines at the top of each page, each with a different font size to provide visual hierarchy.

stamp-pdf-with-dynamic-barcode.title: Stamp PDF with Dynamic Barcode Using Document ID
stamp-pdf-with-dynamic-barcode.description: Demonstrates how to generate a barcode from a PDF's unique identifier and stamp it onto each page using Aspose.Pdf facades.

apply-rotated-text-stamp-to-odd-pages.title: Apply Rotated Text Stamp to Odd Pages
apply-rotated-text-stamp-to-odd-pages.description: Demonstrates adding a 30‑degree rotated red text stamp to the left margin of every odd‑numbered page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-dynamic-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Dynamic Text Stamp to PDF
add-dynamic-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a formatted text stamp with dynamic author and date values using string interpolation and applying it to every page of a PDF via Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-repeating-background-image-stamp.title: Add Repeating Background Image Stamp to PDF
add-repeating-background-image-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to apply a single image stamp as a background watermark on every page of a PDF document.

add-multi-line-colored-header-stamp.title: Add Multi‑Line Colored Header Stamp to PDF Pages
add-multi-line-colored-header-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to add a multi‑line header to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with each line rendered in a different font color.
